response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience including staff and senior positions. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS background fits the stack well, and Berlin location aligns with on-site requirement. However, the seniority mismatch raises concerns about retention, salary expectations, and willingness to take on entry-level scope. Only basic German may also be a fit issue depending on team language.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Berlin-based, matches on-site requirement, with relevant AWS/Kubernetes/Docker exposure
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD) and recent AI/LLM tooling work
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level role — likely retention and salary mismatch
Only basic German, which may limit fit for a German-market energy consulting platform
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed; database experience is mostly MongoDB
